wildcardPipeline_a11y_reduceMotion.name: Reduce motion
wildcardPipeline_a11y_reduceMotion.tooltip: Disables Wildcard Pipeline animations and transitions. Match system honors the OS prefers-reduced-motion setting.

wildcardPipeline_a11y_contrast.name: Contrast
wildcardPipeline_a11y_contrast.tooltip: Bumps border + text contrast on Wildcard Pipeline widgets. Match system honors the OS prefers-contrast setting.
